metadata.name: Morph: face-down creature dies and is revealed
metadata.description: p1 has Exalted Angel in hand. p1 casts it face-down via Morph as a 2/2 creature. p2 then casts Lightning Bolt targeting the face-down creature. Since the face-down creature has toughness 2, the 3 damage is lethal and the creature dies via SBA. The creature goes to the graveyard revealed as Exalted Angel (CR 702.37f: when a face-down permanent leaves the battlefield, it is revealed). Tests CR 702.37 (Morph), CR 704.5g (lethal damage SBA), and CR 702.37f (reveal on zone change).
metadata.generation_notes: Exalted Angel cast face-down: 2/2 colorless creature (CR 708.2a). Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to it; since toughness is 2, the damage is lethal (CR 704.5g). SBA check destroys the creature, which goes to the graveyard. CR 702.37f: a face-down permanent that leaves the battlefield must be revealed to all players. In the graveyard, the card is Exalted Angel (its true identity). The graveyard assertion uses zones.graveyard.p1 includes 'Exalted Angel' (the graveyard holds the card by its true identity, not the face-down 2/2 overlay). p2 needs {R} to cast Lightning Bolt; given in mana_pool. After the morph spell resolves, active player p1 gets priority (CR 116.3); p1 must pass priority before p2 can act. Priority_pass from p1 is included before p2 casts Lightning Bolt.

script.step_note: p1 casts Exalted Angel face-down via Morph for {3}

actions.description: Initial: Exalted Angel in p1 hand, Lightning Bolt in p2 hand

actions.note: CR 702.37a: p1 casts Exalted Angel face-down as a 2/2 colorless creature for {3}.
Both players pass priority. Morph spell resolves.
CR 608.2: Face-down 2/2 colorless creature enters battlefield under p1's control.

actions.description: After morph resolution: p1 hand empty, stack empty
actions.note: Face-down 2/2 is on battlefield but has no visible name (CR 708.2a).

script.step_note: p1 passes priority; p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting the face-down 2/2 creature

actions.note: CR 116.3: After the morph spell resolved, p1 (active player) received priority. p1 passes to let p2 act.
CR 601.2: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting the face-down 2/2 creature (identified by card id 'exalted-angel').

actions.description: Lightning Bolt on stack, p2 hand empty

actions.note: Both players pass priority. Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to the face-down 2/2 creature (toughness 2).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Lightning Bolt resolves; 3 damage marked on the face-down creature.

results.description: Face-down 2/2 creature has 3 damage marked (>= toughness 2); it is destroyed.

actions.note: CR 704.5g: Creature with damage >= toughness is destroyed. CR 702.37f: Face-down permanent leaving battlefield is revealed as Exalted Angel.

actions.description: After death: Exalted Angel in p1 graveyard (revealed), stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.37f: A face-down permanent that leaves the battlefield must be revealed. The card is in the graveyard as Exalted Angel (its true oracle name).
